name: Kardex Holding AG
summary: Kardex Holding AG provides intralogistics solutions, and supplies automated storage solutions and materials handling systems worldwide. The company operates through Kardex Remstar and Kardex Mlog segments. The Kardex Remstar segment develops, produces, and maintains dynamic storage and retrieval systems. The Kardex Mlog segment offers integrated material handling systems and automated high bay warehouses. The company also provides conveyor systems, stracker cranes, software solutions, buffering and sequencing solutions, vertical and horizontal systems, pick and place robots, and life cycle services, as well as office solutions. Kardex Holding AG is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.
